Tolen - The Lord of the kings
Many right-wing people shudder at the mere name "Marx", and
consider Marxism to be the source of all that is evil in the world.
However, it should be underlined that Marx's writings, and the
Capital in particular, have been absolutely essential in the
development of modern and contemporary philosophy and
politics, influencing many right-wing movements as well. This
means that even if you disagree with him, and you probably will,
reading the Capital with an open mind and no prejudice is vital to

Matrix and the Fabric of Reality
Fascism and National Socialism (nazism) are two ideologies
which share many similarities, but they are not the same thing,
and the two terms cannot be used as synonyms. Obviously, they
are both different from Marxist socialism, as they both reject the
key Marxist concept of class struggle. But you should know this
because you've read the Capital now, right?
